main.description: Compute Contract Bid Accept (CCBA). Issued by the requester to indicate which CCB they are accepting. References the CCRFP, CCB, and CCBAP (payment receipt). The CCBA AT URI/CID is what is submitted to the provider's /ccr endpoint.

embed.description: Strong reference to the CCRFP being fulfilled.

bid.description: Strong reference to the accepted CCB.

payment.description: Strong reference to the CCBAP that records the x402 payment proof.
